mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GROUP1 ( g_id, id, g_title, category, user_max, price, area, addr1, addr2, latitude, longitude, start_date, last_date, comment1, comment2, type ) VALUES ( group1_seq.nextval, 1, #{g_title}, #{category}, #{user_max}, #{price}, substr(#{addr1}, 6, 2), #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{start_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{last_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{comment1}, #{comment2}, #{type} )
mapper.select: SELECT g_id, g_title, category, user_max, price, area, comment2, type, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS"Z"') AS start_date FROM GROUP1 WHERE type=#{type}

SELECT g_id, id, g_title, type, user_max, price, addr2, addr1, comment1, comment2, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS"Z"') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(last_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS"Z"') AS last_date, latitude, longitude FROM GROUP1 WHERE g_id= #{gId}
